narrative: I noticed a medium-severity memory error disrupting Neo4j access due to authentication failure (Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized), potentially affecting entity relationship tracking in Mem0. I also observed five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lacking versioned prompts, which breaks our prompt management protocol. These discrepancies contradict my self-improvement mandate to maintain standardized agent configurations. Despite system health status showing "healthy," these issues risk inconsistent behavior and degraded knowledge graph growth across sessions.
